title: Positive flow: User clicks 'Let's Go!' button
test_steps: Open the application. | Navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'Let's Go!' button.
expected_result: The application should proceed to the next onboarding step. | The 'Let's Go!' button should be disabled after being clicked.

title: Negative flow: User clicks 'Maybe Later' button
test_steps: Open the application. | Navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'Maybe Later' button.
expected_result: The application should remain on the onboarding screen. | The 'Maybe Later' button should be disabled after being clicked.

title: Negative flow: User clicks 'Maybe Later' button multiple times
test_steps: Open the application. | Navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'Maybe Later' button multiple times.
expected_result: The application should remain on the onboarding screen. | The 'Maybe Later' button should be disabled after the first click.

title: Negative flow: User clicks 'Let's Go!' button without providing any information
test_steps: Open the application. | Navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'Let's Go!' button.
expected_result: The application should prompt the user to provide information. | The 'Let's Go!' button should be disabled until the user provides information.

title: Negative flow: User clicks 'Maybe Later' button and then 'Let's Go!' button
test_steps: Open the application. | Navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'Maybe Later' button. | Click on the 'Let's Go!' button.
expected_result: The application should remain on the onboarding screen. | The 'Maybe Later' button should be disabled after the first click.

title: Negative flow: User clicks 'Maybe Later' button and then 'Maybe Later' button
test_steps: Open the application. | Navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'Maybe Later' button. | Click on the 'Maybe Later' button again.
expected_result: The application should remain on the onboarding screen. | The 'Maybe Later' button should be disabled after the first click.

title: Negative flow: User clicks 'Let's Go!' button and then 'Maybe Later' button
test_steps: Open the application. | Navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'Let's Go!' button. | Click on the 'Maybe Later' button.
expected_result: The application should remain on the onboarding screen. | The 'Let's Go!' button should be disabled after being clicked.

test_steps: Open the application. | Navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'Maybe Later' button. | Click on the 'Let's Go!' button.
expected_result: The application should remain on the onboarding screen. | The 'Maybe Later' button should be disabled after the first click.
